user.title: Set up visitor parking
user.description: Choose your municipality and sign in to your visitor parking account.

auth.title: Connect your account
auth.description: Sign in to your visitor parking account.

permit.title: Select permit
permit.description: Choose the permit to manage in Home Assistant.

reconfigure.title: Update endpoints
reconfigure.description: Update the base or API URL for {name}. Leave blank to keep the current values.

abort.wrong_account: The selected account does not match this entry

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your network connection and try again.
error.invalid_municipality: Unknown municipality. Choose a municipality from the list or enter a matching name.
error.no_permits: No permits were found for this account.
error.rate_limit: Too many requests to the provider. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.service_unavailable: The provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

init.title: Options
init.description: Customize parking behavior for this permit: configure custom chargeable hours per day, set free parking days, and manage automatic reservation ending.

data.auto_end_reservation_when_free: Automatically end reservations when parking is free

operating_times.name: Custom chargeable windows
operating_times.description: Override the default chargeable hours per day. Leave a day empty to keep the default.

data_description.monday_free_parking: Permit is not active on Monday; parking is free.
data_description.monday_chargeable_windows: Enter chargeable windows, for example 09:00-13:00, 14:00-17:30. Leave empty to use the provider's default hours. If free parking is enabled, input in this field will be ignored.
data_description.tuesday_free_parking: Permit is not active on Tuesday; parking is free.
data_description.tuesday_chargeable_windows: Enter chargeable windows, for example 09:00-13:00, 14:00-17:30. Leave empty to use the provider's default hours. If free parking is enabled, input in this field will be ignored.
data_description.wednesday_free_parking: Permit is not active on Wednesday; parking is free.
data_description.wednesday_chargeable_windows: Enter chargeable windows, for example 09:00-13:00, 14:00-17:30. Leave empty to use the provider's default hours. If free parking is enabled, input in this field will be ignored.
data_description.thursday_free_parking: Permit is not active on Thursday; parking is free.
data_description.thursday_chargeable_windows: Enter chargeable windows, for example 09:00-13:00, 14:00-17:30. Leave empty to use the provider's default hours. If free parking is enabled, input in this field will be ignored.
data_description.friday_free_parking: Permit is not active on Friday; parking is free.
data_description.friday_chargeable_windows: Enter chargeable windows, for example 09:00-13:00, 14:00-17:30. Leave empty to use the provider's default hours. If free parking is enabled, input in this field will be ignored.
data_description.saturday_free_parking: Permit is not active on Saturday; parking is free.
data_description.saturday_chargeable_windows: Enter chargeable windows, for example 09:00-13:00, 14:00-17:30. Leave empty to use the provider's default hours. If free parking is enabled, input in this field will be ignored.
data_description.sunday_free_parking: Permit is not active on Sunday; parking is free.
data_description.sunday_chargeable_windows: Enter chargeable windows, for example 09:00-13:00, 14:00-17:30. Leave empty to use the provider's default hours. If free parking is enabled, input in this field will be ignored.

free_parking_dates.name: Free parking days
free_parking_dates.description: Enter comma-separated dates when parking is free. Use DD-MM for annually recurring dates (e.g. 25-12, 01-01, 27-04) and DD-MM-YYYY for one-off dates (e.g. 18-04-2025, 05-05-2025). Both formats can be mixed: 25-12, 01-01, 18-04-2025.

data_description.free_dates: Leave empty if there are no fixed free parking days.

error.invalid_time_range: End time must be after start time.
error.invalid_override_format: Enter time windows in the format HH:MM-HH:MM, separated by commas.
error.invalid_free_date_format: Enter dates as DD-MM (e.g. 25-12) or DD-MM-YYYY (e.g. 18-04-2025), separated by commas.

end_before_start.message: The end time must be after the start time.

update_requires_changes.message: Provide at least one field to update.

update_requires_full_details.message: The fallback update requires start time, end time, and license plate.

update_requires_license_plate.message: Updating a favorite without a license plate is not supported.

reservation_operation_failed.message: The reservation request failed. Try again later.

reservation_auth_failed.message: Sign-in failed. Reauthenticate and try again.

reservation_network_failed.message: Cannot reach the parking provider. Check your network and try again.

reservation_validation_failed.message: The provider rejected the request. Check the dates and license plate.

reservation_provider_failed.message: The provider returned an error. Try again later.

favorite_operation_failed.message: The favorite request failed. Try again later.

favorite_auth_failed.message: Sign-in failed. Reauthenticate and try again.

favorite_network_failed.message: Cannot reach the parking provider. Check your network and try again.

favorite_validation_failed.message: The provider rejected the request. Check the license plate.

favorite_provider_failed.message: The provider returned an error. Try again later.

status_operation_failed.message: The permit status could not be loaded. Try again later.

invalid_target.message: The selected device is not available.
